player_update.reported_context: Mitchell will come off the bench for Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals against San Antonio.
player_update.role_note: Jalen Williams return pushes Mitchell back into reserve role after high-usage Lakers semifinal stretch. Still expected to remain a key rotation contributor.

okc_usage_distribution.note: Mitchell remains live for bench burst but loses starter-level touch security.

market_implications.tail_status: Ajay Mitchell Under 13.5 upgraded from LEAN to PLAYABLE LEAN if price is -115 or better
market_implications.avoid: Do not play Mitchell overs unless live minutes exceed projected bench pattern or Jalen Williams shows limitation.
market_implications.correlation: Supports OKC primary creator concentration and slightly strengthens SGA/Jalen usage assumptions.
